note: AS-BUILT v0.6.5. Two additive, gated, elbow-only passes in the shared edge-routing pipeline (finishEdges + computePerimeterPorts), each mirrored byte-for-byte in the vnmRuntime twin (dom-runtime-parity green). (#1) NEW separateConvergentJogs() generalizes v0.6.2's separateAntiParallelJogs from a node PAIR to a node SIDE: it keys each endpoint's border-adjacent jog (a target's LAST interior run / a source's FIRST) by (node, orientation, toward-border, collinear along) and fires on a bucket of >=3 collinear jogs (CONVERGE_MIN=3 — chosen so the pass no-ops on every existing fixture: the corpus has zero >=3 collinear border bundles, so clean diagrams stay byte-identical; 2-edge cases are left to the anti-parallel pass). The bundle is spread JOG_GAP=26 apart, ordered by far-end perp coord, centred on the mean then translated so the border-nearest lane anchors ON the mean and the fan opens AWAY from the node (the jogs are border-adjacent, so a symmetric centre would push a lane across the border). On architecture.mmd this de-tangles RULES-top's 4 jogs (1190 -> 1112/1138/1164/1190) AND BE's 3-edge bottom bundle. (#2) NEW deskewer rule in computePerimeterPorts: a node with a lone in-top + lone out-bottom (or lone left+right) pair whose FAR NODES head in opposite directions gets one port nudged PORT_STEP/2 toward its far node (MCP: e3's top port -> x=385.25, offset from e4's x=400.25 exit). Gated on far-node direction (NOT the dagre bend, which runs straight through MCP) so a genuine straight A->B->C pass and all fixtures stay byte-identical (0 corpus firings). Defect #3 (long BE<->RULES verticals cutting through the ENGINE container) is DEFERRED as planned — needs subgraph-aware routing; container boxes are post-layout (computeSubgraphBoxes), never routing obstacles.

diagrams.title: As-built: separateConvergentJogs() (#1, gate >=3, anchor-away) + computePerimeterPorts far-node deskewer (#2) in the shared finishEdges pipeline, mirrored in the runtime twin; subgraph-aware routing (#3) deferred

before.title: As-is: 4 collinear jogs at y=1190 tangle above RULES; MCP skewered at x=400; e5/e6 cut through the ENGINE box
